channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: Divergence and Tacit Understanding in the China–Philippines Provisional Arrangement at Second Thomas Shoal
item.description: Second Thomas Shoal has become one of the most sensitive flashpoints in the South China Sea dispute between China and the Philippines. Since 1999, when the Philippines deliberately grounded the warship BRP Sierra Madre on the shoal, the feature has steadily evolved into a key front line in the broader maritime contest between the two […]

item.title: Redesigning Japan’s Space Security Ecosystem for a Stronger U.S.-Japan Alliance
item.description: As space becomes a foundational domain for the U.S.-Japan alliance, Japan has important opportunities to strengthen its space security ecosystem.
